query:
SELECT 
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tx.value, '$.type')) as type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tx.value, '$.status')) as status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM espn_season_cache c
JOIN JSON_TABLE(
  JSON_EXTRACT(c.payload, '$.transactions'),
  '$[*]' COLUMNS (value JSON PATH '$')
) tx
WHERE c.season = 2026
GROUP BY type, status
ORDER BY count DESC;
